properties.titulo_evento: US military launches strikes on southern Iran amid talks in Qatar
properties.descricao: US Central Command announces 'self-defence' strikes as Tehran's top negotiators gather in Qatar for talks.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: US strikes Iran’s south, Tehran officials in Qatar for talks
properties.descricao: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has ordered the restoration of internet services after months of blocked access.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump pays tribute to US troops killed in war on Iran on Memorial Day
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump marked Memorial Day at Arlington National Cemetery, paying tribute to US troops killed.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump dangles normalisation amid pro-Israel criticism of possible Iran deal
properties.descricao: US president says he is 'mandatorily requesting' that regional countries establish formal relations with Israel.

properties.titulo_evento: Kyiv’s Chornobyl Museum devastated in overnight Russian missile attack
properties.descricao: Kyiv's Chornobyl Museum devastated in overnight Russian missile attack.

properties.titulo_evento: Father mourns daughter killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
properties.descricao: A six-year-old Palestinian girl was killed by an Israeli strike on a displacement camp in Khan Younis.

properties.titulo_evento: In Lebanon, everything and nothing has changed since 2000
properties.descricao: A local war has gone regional, drawing in Iran and the US, but its root cause is unchanged: Palestine.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel escalates Gaza attacks as Netanyahu stalls ceasefire for polls
properties.descricao: Analysts warn Netanyahu is exploiting a failing "ceasefire" to prolong the destruction of Gaza ahead of Israeli election

properties.titulo_evento: US military says it has launched new strikes on southern Iran
properties.descricao: The strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats were taken in "self-defence", US Central Command says.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
properties.descricao: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia threatens more Kyiv strikes and tells foreign nationals to leave
properties.descricao: It comes after the Ukrainian capital suffered one of the biggest aerial assaults of the war overnight on Saturday.

properties.titulo_evento: Netanyahu says Israel will intensify strikes against Hezbollah
properties.descricao: The Israeli military hits targets in eastern Lebanon after the prime minister announces further strikes.

properties.titulo_evento: More than 1.5m foreign pilgrims begin Hajj despite Iran war fears
properties.descricao: Saudi Arabia says that is 11,000 more than the number of Muslims who travelled to the Gulf kingdom last year.

properties.titulo_evento: Anger grows after China's deadliest coal mining disaster in years
properties.descricao: On China's tightly-controlled internet, people are calling for justice and questioning how this happened.

properties.titulo_evento: Mexico set to host Iranian football team during World Cup
properties.descricao: The future of Iran's World Cup campaign has been thrown into doubt by the Trump administration's military attacks and the ensuing chaos in the Middle East and beyond.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran delegation in Qatar seeks deal on frozen assets and Hormuz blockade
properties.descricao: A high-level Iranian delegation led by parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, FM Abbas Araghchi and central bank chief Abdolnaser Hemmati arrived in Doha on Monday to discuss US accords and the unfreezing of blocked assets, according to anonymo...

properties.titulo_evento: More than 1.5m Muslim pilgrims begin hajj as Iran peace deal hangs in the balance
properties.descricao: Despite the uncertainty triggered by the Iran war, Saudi officials noted over the weekend that more pilgrims had travelled from abroad to participate in this year’s hajj than in 2025.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran executes two over protests and alleged espionage as court sentences four more to death
properties.descricao: Iran executed two men over the January protests and the war while a Tehran court sentenced four to death in a 2022 protest case amid UN condemnation.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran says it is charging fees for 'navigational services' through Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Iran effectively shuttered the crucial waterway in the early days of the war and in mid-April the US responded by imposing its own blockade on Iranian ports.

properties.titulo_evento: Zelenskyy visits damaged Kyiv sites after Russian missile and drone assault
properties.descricao: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy visited damaged buildings and the Chernobyl Museum in Kyiv after a major Russian missile and drone attack that killed at least two people and wounded dozens.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran says progress on many issues with US but final peace agreement not imminent
properties.descricao: Writing on his social media platform, US President Donald Trump said "constructive" talks were underway but "both sides must take their time and get it right."

properties.titulo_evento: US military says it launched new strikes on southern Iran
properties.descricao: The US military's Central Command said it had carried out “self-defense” strikes in southern Iran. Meanwhile, Israeli PM Netanyahu said he ordered the military to increase strikes against Hezbollah. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Chinese human rights cases in limbo after Trump-Xi summit
properties.descricao: Trump and Xi said they had discussed political prisoners in China, including Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai. Ahead of Xi's September visit to Washington, advocates are urging the US to apply more pressure on China.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: More than 1,900 missing children
properties.descricao: Authorities say there are 1,933 missing children cases nationwide, up 6.8% from the year before. And, travellers in Germany seem nervous when it comes to air travel, amid the war in Iran, a survey suggests.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's Dr. Wolff cosmetics company is going all in on AI
properties.descricao: This medium-sized, family-run business has embraced artificial intelligence to stay competitive. All employees are encouraged to learn about and apply LLMs.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump says US won't 'rush into' deal with Tehran
properties.descricao: The US president says negotiations are proceeding in "an orderly and constructive manner," while Iranian officials say key differences still need to be settled. Follow DW for more.

properties.titulo_evento: Cuba receives China rice shipment amid US threats, blackouts
properties.descricao: Chinese aid is expected to alleviate food shortages in Cuba. But the island's economic crisis continues with blackouts and oil embargos are compunded by threats from the United States.

properties.titulo_evento: China mine blast: Search and investigation continue
properties.descricao: Chinese authorities have launched an investigation into "serious breaches" of security regulations after an explosion in a coal mine left at least 82 people dead. Two people remain missing.

properties.titulo_evento: How the Venice Biennale became Russia’s way back into Europe
properties.descricao: Moscow's brief yet controversial return reignited debate over its place in Europe's cultural institutions, even as the war in Ukraine continues.

properties.titulo_evento: US says it launched ‘self-defense strikes’ in Iran as peace negotiations drag on
properties.descricao: U.S. Central Command said in a statement it “continues to defend our forces while using restraint during the ongoing ceasefire.”

properties.titulo_evento: ‘Rabbit holes all over the place’: How hard it would be for Trump to rebuild Cuba
properties.descricao: The Trump administration continues to ratchet up economic pressure on Cuba and is inching closer to military action as it looks to weaken or even topple the regime there.

properties.titulo_evento: Carney warns Alberta not to pull a ‘Brexit’
properties.descricao: Canada’s prime minister says a referendum on whether to pursue separation would be “a very dangerous bluff”

properties.titulo_evento: Italy’s local elections puncture hopes of center-left revival
properties.descricao: Early vote tallies appear positive for Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni.

properties.titulo_evento: UK defense minister’s plane has signal jammed near Russian border
properties.descricao: John Healey was returning from visiting British troops deployed in Estonia when the interference took place.

properties.titulo_evento: $140,000 E.V.s and Heritage Gold: The Rise of China’s Homegrown Luxury Market
properties.descricao: As China’s economy slows, consumers are increasingly turning to domestic luxury products, challenging the dominance of long-established European brands.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Prices Fall Sharply on News of Possible Iran Deal
properties.descricao: The cost of crude hit a one-month low and S&P 500 futures were up as investors assessed the prospects for a lasting peace deal.
